name: Mirror Image Internet Advances Delivery Services for Current and New Customers
description: Aberdeen vendor profile of Mirror Image Internet, a CDN (content delivery network) service provider, produced in May 2004 and underwritten by Mirror Image. Profiles the company's Content Access Point (CAP) architecture, two customer case studies (Fastclick online advertising; anonymous international toy retailer), and the new Smart Content services platform combining XML-based rules engine with CDN delivery. Aberdeen concludes Mirror Image meets CDN availability/cost-cutting requirements and recommends evaluation of next-generation application delivery capabilities.
